title: O.F.Device (Ore Farming Device)
body:
# O.F.Device (Ore Farming Device) Adds devices for farming ores. The OF Device which is added by this mod produces ores at a certain rate by consuming materials and fuel. ## OF Device ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/O.F.Device/main/docs/media/recipe_device_0_v010.png) OF Devices can be mined using any pickaxe. The appearance of the OF Device block can be changed using a stick. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SKNck22P/images/6830837992fe451e5a3c35c804c3fe081848a9ad.gif) ### Modification Modifying the device will speed up production and cause a greater variety of ores to appear. |To MOD 1|MOD 1 to MOD 2| |:--:|:--:| |![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/O.F.Device/main/docs/media/recipe_device_1_v020.png)|![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/O.F.Device/main/docs/media/recipe_device_2_v020.png)| ### GUI and Hopper Automation ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/O.F.Device/main/docs/media/gui_device_0_v010.png)![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/O.F.Device/main/docs/media/processing_line_v040.png) 1. Materials 2. Fuel 3. Products ### Materials - Cobblestone - Cobbled Deepslate (1.18+) - Netherrack - OF C Feeder I - OF C Feeder II OF C Feeders can act as Cobblestone (device y в‰Ґ 1) or Cobbled Deepslate (device y в‰¤ 0), and are not consumed. However, when using OF C Feeder I, it consumes twice as much fuel. |OF C Feeder I|OF C Feeder II| |:--:|:--:| |![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/O.F.Device/main/docs/media/recipe_cobblestone_feeder_v030.png)|![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/O.F.Device/main/docs/media/recipe_cobblestone_feeder_2_v100.png)| ### Fuel The same items can be used for fuel as for the vanilla furnace. ### Products
From Cobblestone |Products|Unmod.|MOD 1|MOD 2| |:--:|:--:|:--:|:--:| |Stone|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Coal Ore|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Iron Ore|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Copper Ore|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Redstone Ore||вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Lapis Lazuli Ore|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Gold Ore||вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Emerald Ore|||вњ”пёЏ| |Diamond Ore||вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Amethyst Shard (v2+)|||вњ”пёЏ|
From Cobbled Deepslate (1.18+) |Products|Unmod.|MOD 1|MOD 2| |:--:|:--:|:--:|:--:| |Deepslate|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Deepslate Redstone Ore||вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Deepslate Iron Ore|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Deepslate Copper Ore|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Deepslate Gold Ore||вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Deepslate Diamond Ore||вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Deepslate Lapis Lazuli Ore|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Deepslate Coal Ore|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Deepslate Emerald Ore|||вњ”пёЏ| |Amethyst Shard|||вњ”пёЏ|
From Netherrack |Products|Unmod.|MOD 1|MOD 2| |:--:|:--:|:--:|:--:| |Nether Brick|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Nether Quartz Ore|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Nether Gold Ore|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ|вњ”пёЏ| |Ancient Debris|||вњ”пёЏ|
[Probabilities of products](https://github.com/Iunius118/O.F.Device/blob/main/docs/draft.md#of-devices-%EF%BD%8F%EF%BD%86%E8%A3%85%E7%BD%AE) #### Farming Efficiency Appearance rate of ores increases with number of players, villagers, etc. (up to 3) around the device (5x3x5). ## OF C Device OF C Device is a cobblestone generator. ![ ](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/O.F.Device/main/docs/media/recipe_cobblestone_device_0_v110.png) ### GUI ![ ](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/O.F.Device/main/docs/media/gui_cobblestone_device_0_v110.png) Hopper can be used to pull cobblestones from underside of the device. ## Data Pack Built-in optional data pack. ### OF C Feeder T recipes [v13.0.0+] ID: `orefarmingdevice:feeder_t_recipes` A data pack to add OF C Feeder T recipes.
OF C Feeder T OF C Feeder T is the improved version of Feeder II with about three times the efficiency. This item can only be used with OF Device Mod 2. This item's recipe becomes available when the built-in data pack is enabled. ![ ](https://github.com/Iunius118/O.F.Device/raw/main/docs/media/recipe_cobblestone_feeder_tnt_v1300.png)
## Config - NeoForge version: `/config/orefarmingdevice-server.toml` - Forge version: `/serverconfig/orefarmingdevice-server.toml` Restart the game or server when you change the config. In multiplayer mode, server-side config will be used.
